design_system.mission: Create a premium, high-conversion marketing site for Escola Cruzeiro Vila Velha that rivals Nike/Adidas academies.
design_system.theme_logic: Light mode base for clarity and trust, with deep blue 'Dark Mode' containers (Hero, Footer, Call-to-Action) to anchor the Cruzeiro brand identity.

primary.name: Cruzeiro Royal
primary.usage: Primary Brand Color, Headers, Hero Backgrounds

secondary.name: Midnight Navy
secondary.usage: Footer, Deep contrast sections, Active states

accent.name: Star Gold
accent.usage: Primary CTAs, Star Icons, High-priority highlights (Use sparingly)

headings.usage: Hero titles, Section headers, Card titles

layout.spacing: Generous (2x standard). Use py-24 for major sections.

buttons.primary: bg-[#F1BE10] text-[#003399] hover:bg-[#D4A000] font-bold uppercase tracking-wide shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-white text-white hover:bg-white/10 font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide transition-all rounded-full px-8 py-4
buttons.whatsapp: fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(37,211,102,0.4)] hover:scale-110 transition-transform animate-pulse

cards.style: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-slate-100 hover:shadow-md hover:border-blue-100 transition-all duration-300

visual_enhancers.overlays: Use 'bg-gradient-to-r from-[#003399]/90 to-[#1a3080]/80' over hero images to ensure text legibility.
visual_enhancers.texture: Add a subtle noise texture to deep blue backgrounds to mimic jersey fabric.
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React (Stroke width: 1.5px or 2px). Use Gold color for trust icons.

images.trust_badge_stars: Create a row of 5 gold stars using Lucide Star icon.

universal_guidelines: Mobile First: Design for the phone in hand. Large touch targets (min 44px).
No Generic Gradients: Use solid deep blues or subtle textures.
Data Test IDs: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
Performance: Use lazy loading for images below the fold.
Accessibility: Ensure text contrast ratios meet WCAG AA (especially white text on blue).
Motion: Use scroll-reveal animations (fade-up) for sections to add dynamism.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install 'lucide-react' if not present (it is in package.json).
2. Create a 'Layout' component that handles the sticky navbar logic.
3. Use the 'Hero' section to make a massive first impression. Full height.
4. The 'Programs' section should use a grid layout, not a simple list.
5. Ensure the WhatsApp button is always visible.
6. Use the defined hex codes strictly. Do not deviate to standard Tailwind blue.
7. For the 'Cruzeiro Badge', since we don't have the SVG, simulate it or use a placeholder circle with stars until provided.
